en.name: Level 50 — The Moribund Highway
en.shortDescription: An infinite desert highway of paused vehicles and eerie silence, roamed by mysterious humans whose intentions stay unknown.
en.atmosphere: A silent desolate desert with frozen traffic; extreme heat and the psychological strain of isolation and uneasy human encounters.
en.tips: Avoid the roaming humans. Mobile homes make safe shelter. Loot vehicles for supplies but don't stay inside. Bring almond water.
